name: Network Security & Zero Trust
description: NAC (802.1X), micro-segmentation, and SASE — network access control, posture assessment, and zero trust enforcement.
quickTip: Collect ISE/NAC RADIUS accounting logs and install Splunk_TA_cisco-ise for structured data.

subcategories.name: Network Access Control (NAC)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco ISE TA (`Splunk_TA_cisco-ise`), Aruba ClearPass TA, Forescout TA.

subcategories.name: VPN & Remote Access
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco ASA/AnyConnect TA, Palo Alto GlobalProtect TA, Fortinet FortiGate Add-On (`TA-fortinet_fortigate`, Splunkbase 2846) for SSL-VPN, Splunk Add-on for Juniper (`Splunk_TA_juniper`, Splunkbase 2847) for SRX VPN, vendor syslog.

subcategories.name: Zero Trust / SASE
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Zscaler TA (`Splunk_TA_zscaler`), Netskope Add-on for Splunk (Splunkbase 3808), Palo Alto Prisma Access TA (`Splunk_TA_paloalto`), Cato Networks Events App (Splunkbase 8037), Fortinet FortiGate Add-On (`TA-fortinet_fortigate`) for FortiSASE, Check Point App for Splunk (Splunkbase 4293), Broadcom Symantec WSS Add-on (Splunkbase 3856), Cloudflare App for Splunk (Splunkbase 4501).
